description: The Bonanno crime family is an Italian American Mafia crime family and one of the Five Families that dominate organized crime in New York City. Founded by Salvatore Maranzano in the 1890s, it was later led by Joseph Bonanno. The family has been involved in racketeering, drug trafficking, and labor union corruption, with operations extending into New Jersey, Florida, California, Arizona, and Montreal. Historically one of the smallest Five Families, it was known for its brutality and internal conflicts such as the Banana War.

country_links.evidence_quote: Montagna was born in Montreal, Quebec, Canada and resided in Elmont, New York... On April 21, 2009, Montagna was deported to Canada and he settled in Montreal. In Montreal, Montagna tried to assume control of the Rizzuto crime family...
country_links.context: The Bonanno family has a member who was based in Montreal and attempted to assume control of the Rizzuto crime family there.

country_links.evidence_quote: wiring the money to accounts in Costa Rica
country_links.context: The Bonanno family routed illegal gambling proceeds through Costa Rica.

country_links.evidence_quote: In 2020, the Italian police together with the FBI discovered a strong link between the Bonannos and the Castellammare del Golfo Mafia family... Most of the summits and meetings were held at Domingo's house in the Gagliardetta district, in Castellammare del Golfo.
country_links.context: The Bonanno family has a strong link with the Castellammare del Golfo Mafia family in Sicily, holding meetings there.

country_links.evidence_quote: The family's operations have also extended into New Jersey, Florida, California, Arizona, and Montreal.
country_links.context: The Bonanno crime family operates in multiple U.S. states including New York, New Jersey, Florida, California, Arizona, and others, with members based in various cities and carrying out criminal activities.

country_links.evidence_quote: most of the Rizzuto family fled to Venezuela.
country_links.context: Members of the Rizzuto family, a faction of the Bonanno family, fled to Venezuela.
